meta.title: SEO Services | Rank Higher & Grow Faster - Codersh

breadcrumb.subtitle: RANK HIGHER. GROW FASTER.
breadcrumb.title: Your Trusted SEO Partner for Sustainable Growth
breadcrumb.content: Every customer journey starts with a Google search - and if you're not showing up, your competitors are winning that sale. We go beyond rankings to bring the right visitors to your site and turn them into paying customers. Through smart strategy, compelling content, and deep technical optimization, we grow your organic presence on any platform - WordPress, Shopify, or React/Next.js.

cards.title: Finding High-Value Keywords Your Ideal Customers Actually Search For
Discover Competitor Gaps You Can Easily Outrank
Map Every Keyword to the Right Page for Better Rankings
Target Keywords That Drive Revenue - Not Just Traffic
Crafting Titles, Meta Descriptions & Headings That Get Clicked
Building Quality Backlinks That Strengthen Your Authority

rightSideContent.subtitle: BUILT TO RANK. BUILT TO PERFORM
rightSideContent.title: Technical SEO That Makes Your Website Perform & Rank
rightSideContent.content: Your content could be perfect - but if your website has hidden technical problems, Google won't rank it. We audit and fix everything so search engines can crawl and understand your site - so you get better rankings and a smoother user experience. Here's what we do:
listItems: Fixing crawl errors, broken links & indexing issues
Improving site structure and internal linking
Mobile responsiveness and Core Web Vitals optimization
Schema markup for better search visibility

leftSideContent.subtitle: BUILD TRUST. GROW FASTER.
leftSideContent.title: Authority Building with Digital PR & Backlinks
leftSideContent.content: Google ranks websites it trusts - and trust is built when credible sites link back to you. We earn you high-quality backlinks through real digital PR, not shortcuts that get penalized. Every link we build strengthens your domain, compounds over time, and pushes your rankings up for good. Here's our approach:
listItems: Creating link-worthy content that publications actually trust
Earning backlinks from authoritative, trusted websites
Building your brand mentions & presence across trusted platforms
Building long-term domain authority - no shortcuts, ever

process.subtitle: OUR SEO APPROACH
process.title:
A Clear SEO Process That
Delivers Real, Lasting Results
process.content:
A transparent step-by-step process so you always know
exactly where your growth is coming from. SEO isn't a one-time fix -
it's a continuous process focused on steady, long-term growth.

cards.title: Audit & Analysis
cards.content: We dig deep into your website, competitors, and current rankings to uncover exactly what's holding you back.

cards.title: Strategy Planning
cards.content: We build a custom SEO roadmap tailored to your business goals — no cookie-cutter plans, ever.

cards.title: Implementation
cards.content: We optimize your content, site structure, and all technical elements for better rankings.

cards.title: Content & Authority Building
cards.content: We continuously strengthen your content and earn high-quality backlinks that compounds your authority.

cards.title: Monitoring & Optimization
cards.content: We monitor results, adjust strategy, and keep refining over time - because SEO never stops working.

whyChoose.title: We Don't Chase Rankings - We Build Systems That Drive Sales
whyChoose.introContent: Most SEO agencies stop at keywords. We focus on what actually drives growth - traffic, conversions, and long-term results. We combine deep SEO expertise with real development skills.
advantages: Dev + SEO expertise - we implement fixes, not just recommendations
Conversion-first strategy that turns organic traffic into actual revenue
Clear Communication - Simple updates, full transparency, no guesswork
Scalable SEO systems built to grow alongside your business
Works Across Platforms - we optimize where you are

items.title: What is SEO and why does my business need it?
items.content: SEO (Search Engine Optimization) helps your website rank higher on Google so potential customers can find you. Without SEO, even a well-designed website may not get traffic or leads.

items.title: How long does SEO take to show results?
items.content: SEO is a long-term strategy. You can typically start seeing improvements in 2–3 months, but significant results usually take 4–6 months depending on your industry and competition.

items.title: What's included in your SEO services?
items.content: Our SEO covers keyword research, content optimization, technical fixes, on-page SEO, backlink building, and ongoing performance tracking.

items.title: Will SEO increase my sales or just traffic?
items.content: Our focus is on attracting the right traffic. That means users who are more likely to convert into leads or customers, not just increasing visitor numbers.

items.title: What is technical SEO and why is it important?
items.content: Technical SEO ensures your website is fast, mobile-friendly, and easy for search engines to crawl and index. Without it, your rankings can suffer even if your content is good.

items.title: Do you guarantee first-page rankings?
items.content: No genuine SEO provider can guarantee rankings. What we do guarantee is a proven strategy, consistent improvements, and transparent reporting.

items.title: Is SEO a one-time process or ongoing?
items.content: SEO is ongoing. Search engines update constantly, and competitors are always optimizing, so continuous improvement is necessary to maintain and grow rankings.

items.title: Can you fix SEO issues on my existing website?
items.content: Yes. We can audit your current website, identify issues, and implement fixes to improve performance and rankings.

items.title: What makes your SEO approach different?
items.content: We combine SEO with development expertise and a conversion-focused mindset.
